description_long: This bungalow features a prominent overhanging brown hip roof with a wide eave, providing shade to the front porch area. The facade includes a mix of white and brown exterior finishes, with vertical wooden slats accenting the porch and side. The front elevation displays three garage doors, two of which have large windows, and a central entryway flanked by windows and a porch. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a continuation of the brown and white color scheme. The structure sits on a flat, paved surface, and the overall design is modern with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The presence of a porch and multiple windows suggests a focus on both outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A modern bungalow with a wide brown hip roof, white and brown exterior, and a front porch accented by vertical wooden slats and large windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the overhanging brown roof, vertical wooden slats on the porch, and minimal window openings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting three garage doors, large windows, the main entry, and the prominent porch with wooden slats.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a simpler facade, fewer windows, and the continuation of the brown and white color scheme.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, limited window openings, and the roof's overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
